hook: Intent conversations work better when they are rooted in observation rather than demand.
body: The clearer you are about what has actually been happening, the easier it is to discuss what should happen next without creating unnecessary pressure.

hook: Some men try to define the future before they have honestly named the present.
body: Start with what is real between you, then ask what shape it makes sense to give it.

body: Saying the connection feels consistent and meaningful is often a better opener than jumping straight to labels.

body: Base exclusivity conversations on lived pattern, not just emotional urgency.
